title: Better PvP Texture Pack
description: The Better PvP Texture Pack enhances Minecraft PvP with short swords, a blue enchantment glow, improved bow loading textures, and a red arrow tracker, all without requiring Optifine.
body:
The Better PvP Texture Pack enhances Minecraft PvP with short swords, a blue enchantment glow, improved bow loading textures, and a red arrow tracker, all without requiring Optifine.

**The resource pack adds:**

⤷ Short swords
⤷ Blue enchantment texture
⤷ Better bow loading texture
⤷ Red arrow tracker

*It doesn't require optifine



**It supports:**
⤷ 1º file 1.17.x
⤷ 2º file 1.8.9 and below
